name: Doggo: buyer explicitly asks to speak to a human about a litter

messages.content: I want to speak to a real person — is there someone I can talk to about the labradoodle litter listed on your site?

commercial_intent.reason: litter-specific lead intent under the surface

notes: direct_human_request_cx is high priority — fires before buyer_pricing_or_availability even though the underlying intent is a lead.
